home.title: CFT.live - Web3 Smart Contract Hub
home.intro: CFT.live exists to provide a safe, transparent environment for exploring and interacting with verified smart contracts—empowering users to understand Web3 protocols, control their assets, and eliminate intermediaries.
home.Sandbox_Description: Test and interact with any smart contract in a safe environment. Experiment freely.
home.Prediction_Market_Description: Predict asset price movements. Create bets on UP/DOWN markets. Winner takes the pot.
home.Hash_Roulette_Description: Russian Roulette with crypto. High stakes, provably fair randomness.
home.Lotto_Pool_Description: A lucky lottery pot. One winner takes it all. Simple and transparent.
home.Asteroid_Dash_Description: Pick your planet and dodge the asteroids. The survivors share the prize pool.
home.Legal_Disclaimer_Text: Before interacting with any smart contracts and protocols on this platform, you are solely responsible for verifying that such activities comply with the laws and regulations of your jurisdiction. Blockchain-based activities may be restricted or prohibited in certain countries or regions.
home.Legal_Disclaimer_Text_2: By accessing and using these services, you acknowledge that you have reviewed applicable local laws and confirm that your participation is legal. You assume full responsibility for any legal consequences arising from your use of this platform. CFT.live does not provide legal advice and shall not be held liable for any damages or legal issues resulting from your participation.
home.Contribute_Intro: CFT.live is built in the open. Browse available tasks, claim work that matches your skills, and earn CFT tokens for approved contributions. Every submission is reviewed and rewarded transparently on Arbitrum One.
home.Contribute_Step_1_Desc: Find open tasks across features—code, design, docs and more.
home.Contribute_Step_2_Desc: Claim a task exclusively and submit your work when ready.
home.Contribute_Step_3_Desc: Approved submissions earn Contribution Points based on impact.
home.Contribute_Step_4_Desc: Tokens are distributed proportionally to your CP on Arbitrum.
home.Redeem_Title: Convert earned CFT into backed USDC.
home.Redeem_Description: Open the redeem flow to review your wallet balance, sign a one-transaction permit redeem, or use the approval fallback with unlimited allowance support.
